query: What is the P/E ratio of Apple?
title: Apple P/E Ratio Analysis
executive_summary: Apple's trailing P/E ratio as of Q1 2026 is approximately 28x, in line with large-cap technology peers.
markdown:
## Analysis

Apple trades at a P/E of 28x based on trailing twelve-month earnings.

## Methodology

P/E calculated as market cap divided by net income.

data_sources.description: Apple income statement and market data
